testcase.name: test_us_user_login

failure.message:
AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_upload_background_analysis.py:69: in test_us_user_login result = self.login_user(US_USER_EMAIL, US_USER_PASSWORD) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_upload_background_analysis.py:37: in login_user assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_contract_guard_upload
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_upload_background_analysis.py:302: in test_contract_guard_upload assert response.status_code == 200, f"Upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Upload failed: {"detail":"Invalid session"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
